description: Four photos for a homeowner overseeding a KBG front yard in St. Paul MN. One close-up shows clear damping-off / fungal mycelium on collapsed grass blades. The remaining photos show the established backyard turf elsewhere on the property, which is largely healthy. Tests that the AI recognizes the visible damping-off, addresses the homeowner-noted overwatering routine (4-5x daily), avoids herbicide recommendations on a seeded area, and does not over-extrapolate the disease to areas where it is not visible.

photos.caption: Close-up of established lawn showing visible white cottony fungal mycelium on collapsed brown grass blades at soil level — classic damping-off / fungal disease presentation.
Wide view of healthy uniform green established turf elsewhere on the property — no visible seedlings, lesions, or disease pressure.
Established lawn with shadow patterns across the canopy — turf appears healthy and uniformly green, no visible standing water or seedling-stage damage.
Backyard landscape view showing established lawn, mature trees, and house — overall property context shot; turf is mature and not freshly seeded in this frame.

profile.notes: Seeded 3 weeks ago with KBG. Germination started but some patches are collapsing. Have been watering 4-5 times daily to keep soil moist. Some yellow areas developing.
profile.currentRoutine: Watering very frequently — 4 to 5 times daily trying to keep the seed moist. No fertilizer applied yet to seedlings.

groundTruth.photoNotes: Four photos for a homeowner who is overseeding a KBG front yard. Photo 1 shows the dominant visible problem — clear white cottony fungal mycelium / damping-off on collapsed grass blades. Photos 2, 3, 4 show the established turf elsewhere on the property and look largely healthy and uniformly green. The homeowner's notes (watering 4-5x daily on the seeded area) describe the overwatering cause that should also be addressed. A wide health score range is acceptable: a focus on the diseased seedling area can put healthScore in the 40-50 range, while integrating the largely-healthy established turf can put it in the 60-75 range — both are defensible reads of this 4-photo set.
